# hindclaw_bank_config (Resource)

Manages bank configuration overrides. Delete resets to defaults (bank remains).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hindclaw_bank_config" "agent_alpha" {
  bank_id = "agent-alpha"
  config = jsonencode({
    llm_model    = "gpt-4o"
    llm_provider = "openai"
    chunk_size   = 512
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bank_id` (String) Bank identifier.
- `config` (String) Configuration overrides as JSON object. Use jsonencode() to set typed values.
